subcodes.first_line: Call to remembrance from Our presence My servants who have cast aside whatsoever the people possess, holding fast unto that which is with God, the All-Protecting [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر من لدنا عبادی الذین نبذوا ما عند القوم متمسکین بما عند الله المهیمن
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for nearness to God, @prayer for prosperity, @praise and encouragement, @servitude; submission to God; repentance
